description: Legal testimony, Qaraite. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: Sunday, 17 Heshvan 5472 AM, which is 1711 CE. It has to do with the floor (ṭabaqa) that is across from the mill, above the house of Raẓon ha-Rofe. The floor belongs to the Qaraite waqf. Elishaʿ and his brother Avraham al-Sākit were living there, and it fell into a ruin. The miller Yūsur Muḥibb sued them to remove the hazardous ruin. They stated that they could not afford to do so, but agreed to vacate their rights to the dwelling and have it revert to the waqf, which would then be responsible for the repairs.
tags: qaraite waqf, ruin, qodesh, Karaites, 18th c
description_he: עדות משפטית קראית. ביהודית-ערבית. תאריך: א', י"ז חשון 5472 = 1711 לספירה. עוסק בקומה שכנגד הטחנה מעל בית רצון הרופא. הקומה שייכת לווקף הקראי. אלישע ואחיו אברהם אל-סאכית ויתרו על זכויות הדירה לטובת הווקף.
